summary: Frontend-only testing of /site-map page with Precision Craft design system. All features verified across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Fixed SEOMetaTags prop usage (robots prop to noindex={true}).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SEOMetaTags was using incorrect prop 'robots' instead of 'noindex={true}'
context_for_next_testing_agent: SiteMapPage fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All requirements verified: Hero (solid navy #0D1B2A background, 3px orange #FF5722 bottom border, eyebrow 'NAVIGATE THE SITE', H1 'Site Map', subtitle 'Complete directory of all pages on FixitBay.net', 4 stats row with 14 Brand Pages + 22 City Pages + 12 SF Neighborhoods + 12 Blog Articles), 7 main sections (A-G) with data-testid attributes, Section A Company: 12 link cards (Home, About Us, Contact, Reviews, Services, Service Areas, All Brands, Local Appliance Repair, Residential Repair, Book Online, Blog & FAQ, Privacy Policy), Section B Services: 12 link cards (Refrigerator/Washer/Dryer/Dishwasher/Oven/Stove/Range/Cooktop/Ice Maker/Wine Cooler/Freezer/Garbage Disposal Repair), Section C Commercial: 1 dark featured card + 5 links, Section D Maintenance: 1 dark featured card + 7 links, Section E Brands: 1 dark featured card + 14 brand links, Section F Cities: 3 city groups (SF & Peninsula 9 cities, Marin 13 cities, SF Neighborhoods 12 neighborhoods) = 34 total city links, Section G Blog: 1 dark featured card + 12 blog links, Link cards have orange left border 3px solid #FF5722 with arrow icons, Dark featured cards have navy bg #0D1B2A with orange top border 3px solid #FF5722, City groups have orange top border with region titles, Bottom CTA with phone (760) 543-5733 and Book Online buttons, Footer with logo, phone, © 2026 FixitBay LLC, NO floating button (data-testid='float-btn' not present), NO mobile sticky bar (mobile-call/book/text not present), All links are internal <Link> components (104 total internal links), Mobile responsive with 2-col grids (165px 165px) and 1-col city grid (342px), SEO: robots='noindex, follow' (fixed), canonical https://fixitbay.net/site-map, BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema.

desktop_1920x1080: Page loads at /site-map without errors
Hero: solid navy #0D1B2A background, 3px solid #FF5722 orange bottom border
Eyebrow text 'NAVIGATE THE SITE'
H1: 'Site Map'
Subtitle: 'Complete directory of all pages on FixitBay.net'
Stats row: 14 Brand Pages, 22 City Pages, 12 SF Neighborhoods, 12 Blog Articles

Section B Appliance Repair Services (data-testid='section-services'): 12 link cards
Section C Commercial (data-testid='section-commercial'): 1 dark featured card + 5 links
Section D Maintenance (data-testid='section-maintenance'): 1 dark featured card + 7 links
Section E Brands (data-testid='section-brands'): 1 dark featured card + 14 links
Section F Cities (data-testid='section-cities'): 3 city groups (SF & Peninsula 9, Marin 13, SF Neighborhoods 12) = 34 links

Link cards: white bg, orange left border 3px solid #FF5722, arrow icon
Dark featured cards: navy bg #0D1B2A, orange top border 3px solid #FF5722
City groups: orange top border 3px solid #FF5722 with region titles

Footer (data-testid='sitemap-footer'): logo, phone (760) 543-5733, © 2026 FixitBay LLC
NO floating button on this page (correct)
Total internal links: 104
mobile_390x844: Grid columns: 2-col (165px 165px) on mobile via CSS media query
City grid: 1-col (342px) on mobile via CSS media query
NO mobile sticky bar on this page (correct)
